message:
feat(overlays): add GotoOverlay and reorganize keyboard shortcuts

New component:
- GotoOverlay.tsx: Dedicated overlay for sequence position navigation
- Registered in OverlayManager alongside other overlays

Keyboard shortcut reorganization:
- actionRegistry.ts: Updated bindings for consistency across experience levels
- Promoter: Shift+P → p
- K-mer Anomaly: Shift+V → Alt+J
- Hilbert: Shift+H → Alt+Shift+H
- Gel: Shift+G → Alt+G
- Dot Plot: . → Alt+O
- Bias Decomposition: Shift+J → Alt+B
- AA Key: k → Shift+K
- AA Legend: l → Shift+L
- HGT: Shift+Y → Alt+H

E2E test updates:
- accessibility.e2e.ts: Added setExperienceLevel() helper to inject
  localStorage preferences before page load, ensuring tests run
  consistently with power user shortcuts enabled
- phage-selection-determinism.e2e.ts: Similar experience level setup
- Updated all overlay keyboard shortcuts to match new bindings

SearchOverlay.tsx:
- Refactored conditional checks into descriptive boolean variables
  (hasDatabase, hasPhage, isInitializing, hasSequence, showSearchUI)
- Improves code readability without changing behavior

Style updates:
- action-drawer.css: Minor tweaks
- components.css: Consolidated styles
- control-deck.css: Layout adjustments
- mobile-ux.css: Mobile refinements
- typography.css: Added style rule

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -108,7 +108,7 @@ export const ActionRegistry: Record<ActionId, ActionDefinition> = {
     title: 'Next phage',
     category: 'Navigation',
     description: 'Move to the next phage in the list',
-    defaultShortcut: [{ key: 'j' }],
+    defaultShortcut: [{ key: 'j' }, { key: 'ArrowDown' }],
     scope: 'global',
     surfaces: ['web'],
   },
@@ -117,7 +117,7 @@ export const ActionRegistry: Record<ActionId, ActionDefinition> = {
     title: 'Previous phage',
     category: 'Navigation',
     description: 'Move to the previous phage in the list',
-    defaultShortcut: [{ key: 'k' }],
+    defaultShortcut: [{ key: 'k' }, { key: 'ArrowUp' }],
     scope: 'global',
     surfaces: ['web'],
   },
